name: Transformers: Rescue Bots
description:
It’s whatever story you want 😉

Available rescue bots: heatwave, Chase, Boulder, Blades

Available Humans: Chief Burns, Cody, Kade, Graham, Dani

(When I say available, I mean coded in. Do not rizz the child 🗿)

Imma be real… I barely watched this show as a kid. I was tfp/tfa all the way. However, I got somewhat of a good grasp of the show and I wanted to show some appreciation to it. So enjoy, stinkers.
creator: Fred Quirkley
